allow: Bash(bash .specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh "Build an Agentic Research Assistant that accepts a natural-language research question, uses an LLM-powered reasoning loop to autonomously decide which tools to call \(Web Search via Tavily, Knowledge Base via FAISS, Synthesis\), and returns a structured response with cited answer, sources, confidence score, and decision trace." --json --short-name "core-research-agent")
Bash(mkdir -p src/agent src/tools src/models src/api src/cli)
Bash(mkdir -p tests/unit/test_agent tests/unit/test_tools tests/unit/test_models tests/integration tests/contract)
Bash(touch src/__init__.py src/agent/__init__.py src/tools/__init__.py src/models/__init__.py src/api/__init__.py src/cli/__init__.py)

Bash(touch tests/__init__.py tests/unit/__init__.py tests/unit/test_agent/__init__.py tests/unit/test_tools/__init__.py tests/unit/test_models/__init__.py tests/integration/__init__.py tests/contract/__init__.py)
Bash(python -m ruff check src/ tests/ --select E,W,F,I,UP,B --ignore B008)
Bash(python -m ruff check src/ tests/ --select E,W,F,I,UP,B --ignore B008 --fix)
